message:
feat(distributed): add region bridge and distributed test suite

- bridge.rs (1286 lines): Bridge layer between local RegionRecord and
  DistributedRegionRecord. Provides transparent upgrade paths from
  local to distributed operation, lifecycle synchronization between
  state machines, and type conversions preserving structured concurrency
  guarantees. Supports RegionMode (Local/Distributed/Upgrading/Degraded)
  with safe transitions.

- tests.rs (985 lines): Comprehensive distributed subsystem test suite
  covering bridge conversions, snapshot serialization, recovery flows,
  and state machine transitions.

- recovery.rs: Refactored recovery logic to integrate with bridge layer.

- mod.rs: Register bridge and tests modules, add re-exports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
